    F

    ffPlayers - Variable in class Model.Board.FlightBoard
     
    fillCabinsWithHumans(CondensedShip) - Method in class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.PlaceAlienState
    Fills all empty cabins with human crew.
    finishBuilding(String, int) - Method in class Controller.Controller
     
    finishBuilding(String, int) - Method in class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.BuildingState
    Finishes assembly for a player and places them on the starting grid.
    finishBuilding(String, int) - Method in class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.HourGlassFinishedState
    Allows remaining players to choose a starting position after the timer expires.
    finishBuilding(String, int) - Method in class Controller.State
     
    FinishBuildingCommand - Class in Controller.Commands
    Command for finishing ship building and choosing starting position.
    FinishBuildingCommand(String, int) - Constructor for class Controller.Commands.FinishBuildingCommand
    Constructs a new FinishBuildingCommand.
    finishedPlayers - Variable in class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.BuildingState
    Map of players who have finished assembly with their starting position
    finishedPlayers - Variable in class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.HourGlassFinishedState
    Map of players who have already finished
    FIRE_POWER - Enum constant in enum class Model.Enums.Criteria
     
    FIRST_RESERVED - Enum constant in enum class Controller.Enums.ComponentOrigin
     
    FixShipState - Class in Controller.RealTimeBuilding
    State that manages the correction of invalid ships for Level 2 After the building phase, players with ships that violate rules must remove components until they are compliant.
    FixShipState(Controller) - Constructor for class Controller.RealTimeBuilding.FixShipState
    Constructor that identifies players with invalid ships, and put them in, playersWithInvalidShip list.
    flightBoard - Variable in class Model.Game
     
    FlightBoard - Class in Model.Board
    FlightBoard: it holds all the good stuff you need during the building and the flying phase.

    FlightBoard constructor of learner level.
    FlightBoard(CardDeck, List<CardDeck>) - Constructor for class Model.Board.FlightBoard
    FlightBoard constructor of level 2.
    FlightBoard(FlightBoard) - Constructor for class Model.Board.FlightBoard
     
    FlightBoardBuilder - Class in Model.Board
    Builder for constructing a FlightBoard for the game.
    FlightBoardBuilder() - Constructor for class Model.Board.FlightBoardBuilder
     
    FlightPhase - Class in Controller.GamePhases
    Represents the Flight Phase of the game, where players take turns to resolve adventure cards and manage their actions during the flight.
    FlightPhase(Controller) - Constructor for class Controller.GamePhases.FlightPhase
     
    FlightState - Class in View.Client.States.Connected.LoggedIn.GameSelected.Playing
    Represents the state of the game when a player is in flight.

    Constructs a FlightState with the specified network, username, and game.

    Flips the hourglass to proceed to the next phase.

    Creates a specific AdventureCardFilip from its JSON representation.
